de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy

Class IsInRangeProvable

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.IsInRangeProvable
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Feature

    public class IsInRangeProvable
extends Object
implements Feature
    Feature used to check if the value of a given term with moduloXXX (with XXX being Long, Int, etc.) is in the range of Long, Integer etc.

    • Method Detail

      • collectAxioms

        private ImmutableSet<Term> collectAxioms(Sequent seq,
                                         PosInOccurrence ignore,
                                         Services services)
        Helper method used to extract the axioms from a given sequent
        Parameters:
        seq - the Sequent from which the axioms are extracted
        ignore - the SequentFormula not to be used as axiom
        services - the Services
        Returns:
        the set of axioms

      • extractAssumptionsFrom

        private ImmutableSet<Term> extractAssumptionsFrom(Semisequent semisequent,
                                                  boolean negated,
                                                  ImmutableSet<Term> assumptions,
                                                  HashSet<Operator> ops,
                                                  SequentFormula formulaToIgnore,
                                                  Services services)
        helper method to determine teh formulas in a semisequent to be used as axioms (or their negations)
        Parameters:
        semisequent - the Semisequent, i.e., antecedent or succedent from which axioms are extracted
        negated - a boolean true if not the formulas of the sequent itself, but their negation should be used as axiom
        assumptions - the already identified axioms
        ops - the Set of operators of interest used to identify axiom candidates
        formulaToIgnore - the SequentFormula that should not be used as axiom under any circumstances (the consequence is derived from this formula)
        services - the Services
        Returns:
        the set of axioms (including the already found axioms assumptions

      • filterSequent

        private boolean filterSequent(HashSet<Operator> ops,
                              IntegerLDT integerLDT,
                              Term formula)
        helper methods to filter out the sequent formulas of interest, here those formulas with an equality between ints or any of the operators in ops as top level operator
        Parameters:
        ops - the Set of Operators
        integerLDT - the IntegerLDT
        formula - the formula to check
        Returns:
        true if the formula should be used axiom

      • isProvable

        protected boolean isProvable(Sequent seq,
                             Services services)
        checks if the sequent is provable
        Parameters:
        seq - the Sequent to be proven
        services - the Services
        Returns:
        true if the sequent could be proven valid

      • setupStrategy

        protected StrategyProperties setupStrategy()
        creates the strategy configuration to be used for the side proof
        Returns:
        the StrategyProperties

      • computeCost

        public RuleAppCost computeCost(RuleApp app,
                               PosInOccurrence pos,
                               Goal goal)
        Description copied from interface: Feature
        Evaluate the cost of a RuleApp.
        Specified by:
        computeCost in interface Feature
        Parameters:
        app - the RuleApp
        pos - position where app is to be applied
        goal - the goal on which app is to be applied
        Returns:
        the cost of the rule application expressed as a RuleAppCost object. TopRuleAppCost.INSTANCE indicates that the rule shall not be applied at all (it is discarded by the strategy).

      • createConsequence

        protected Term createConsequence(PosInOccurrence pos,
                                 Services services)
        creates the term to be proven to follow from a (possibly empty) set of axioms
        Parameters:
        pos - the PosInOccurrence of the focus term
        services - the Services
        Returns:
        the term to prove

      • toSequent

        protected Sequent toSequent(ImmutableSet<Term> axioms,
                            Term toProve)
        creates the sequent axioms ==> toProve
        Parameters:
        axioms - set of terms (conjunctive)
        toProve - the Term to be proven
        Returns:
        the sequent to be proven valid
